title: Include a 'tomorrow' section within My Work
excerpt: Currently ‘My Work’ is split into ‘overdue’, ‘today’, ‘this week’ and ‘next week’. I think it would be really helpful to have a section for ‘tomorrow’ to allow you to see what work is coming up the next day. Currently yo…

posts.author: Amyvacher (Amy Vacher)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently ‘My Work’ is split into ‘overdue’, ‘today’, ‘this week’ and ‘next week’. I think it would be really helpful to have a section for ‘tomorrow’ to allow you to see what work is coming up the next day. Currently you have to look at the specific dates for ‘this week’ which takes much longer if you just want to have a snapshot of tomorrow’s tasks.
